text.title: Architecture Review Meeting Facilitation Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Architecture Review Meeting Facilitation. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: pre-read-distribution
step.action: Share pre-read ≥24h ahead with explicit reading time estimate.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: set-agenda
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: deliberate
step.action: Time-box per item; rotate speaker order to avoid first-speaker bias.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: capture-decision
step.action: Record decision + dissent + follow-ups in the decision log.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: follow-up
step.action: Check prior decisions at the next meeting.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
